author: Jacques de Bay
title: De Venerabili Eucharistiae Sacramento et Sacrificio
remarks:
Counter-reform text. Dedicated to St. Francis de Sales! Written for seminarians in Louvain training to preach to Calvinists. 
Book 3, c. 31: De vestibus sacris: ad Christi passionem representandam simulque ad ministri doctrinam; c. 32: On places; c. 33: actions (including defense of signs of the cross, pg 354); sources mostly patristic, esp Dionysius and Basil; c. 34: Compendiosa expositio formulae missae, pp. 354-366 (Rupert, Innocent, Ambrose, Durandus, Strabo, Alcuin, Amalar, Hugo): extra focus on history; c. 35-39: Canonis missae paraphrasis; c. 40: Our Father
